search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com domain per policy. Prioritized topic-specific English pages over generic home pages. No public-facing mechanic claims should be derived from a single source.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero index page with roster, faction filters, levels, and equipment entries; good lead for hero discovery and character cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster, faction groupings, and gear-related hero info.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with category tabs and per-level badge cost tables; useful for locating research names and cost patterns.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories, unlock paths, and badge costs per level.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English hub page linking to heroes, research, alliance, and strategy sections; useful as a navigation hub but less specific than dedicated pages.

search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.no_results_reason: No search hits on the allowed domain for the requested topic.

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to the approved domain returned no indexed results for the query. No discovery leads found.
search_records.no_results_reason: No search results matched the allowed domain and query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to lastz.fandom.com. Results favored direct wiki pages relevant to heroes, research, and events. No generic homepages were included in the lead set.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event with an Age of Science research theme and a Hero Initiative hero-upgrade theme, plus reward tiers and ranking payouts.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks tied to research and hero growth.
claims_to_verify: Which daily themes include research and hero upgrades

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page listing hero classes and the main factors that affect hero power, including technologies.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero categories and what drives hero power.
claims_to_verify: Whether technologies apply as a hero power bonus

results.title: Heroic Experience | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Resource page showing hero leveling uses Heroic Experience and comes from killing Creeps and Boomers, among other sources.
results.primary_user_job: Trace what resource is used to level heroes and where it comes from.
claims_to_verify: Any event point interaction with this resource

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to www.packsify.com and returned no discoverable results for the provided query. No cross-validation leads found.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were indexed or accessible under the allowed domain for this query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com and returned several Last Z-specific guide pages. Prioritized concrete mechanic pages over generic/brand pages. No public claims marked ready.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated guide for Shooter Camp training, unlocks, upgrade costs, capacity, and speed; useful for progression cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades and training priorities.
claims_to_verify: Training cap and speed by level

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated guide for Assaulter Camp training, cap, speed bonuses, and power growth; good compare point for troop-building pages.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and training priorities.
claims_to_verify: Training cap and speed by level

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for research progression and second lab unlock; useful for dependency checks on HQ and tech paths.
results.primary_user_job: Understand research requirements and lab progression.
